title: selaginella usterii
intro: Selaginella usterii, also known as Uster's spikemoss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, which is a group of small, ancient plants that resemble ferns. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Selaginella usterii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. Selaginella usterii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to provide a range of health benefits when consumed.
